column1: I (to wait) for you a long time.
I (to stay) with them for two weeks now.
She (to talk) to her boss since morning. I believe she is in trouble.
It (to rain) all day long. I’m sick and tired of this weather.
He (not to work) all weekend. He is lying.
I can’t go to the mountains with you, I (to break) my arm.
I’m so upset. You (not to do) your homework again!
I (to see) a koala in the local zoo three times.
